name: get_tariff_account_and_permissions
description: Retrieve tariff account details and permissions for a home, including ownership status, home link status, and pending link status

home_id.description: The ID of the home to retrieve tariff account and permissions for

body.query: query TariffAccountAndPermissions($homeId: ID!) { home(id: $homeId) { tariff { account { isOwnedByCurrentUser isLinkedToHome isPendingHomeLink } accessPermissions { canAccessEnergyReadings canAccessEnergyPrices canAccessPushNotificationSettings } } } }
